text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet gazes pensively off into the
distance.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Eek?! What the heck! Don't startle me like that!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
S-So it's time to train already, is it? Hmph, no
problem! I'm ready whenever!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: All right, maybe I misspoke!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
What I meant was, I thought we were going to
watch a race today!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Where did that remote get to? Ugh, fine. I'll just
do it by hand...

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
All eyes are on the talented athletes in this year's
Japanese Derby...

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text: Blip.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I just don't get it.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
What does she even mean by "cool"? If that's her
goal, she could at least be consistent.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
She entered the Oka Sho, then totally reversed
course and changed tours. She quit like a coward
midway! Is that supposed to be cool? It seems
pretty lame to me!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: And yet...
choice_data_list: Why did she enter the Derby?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: That's what I'd like to know! I don't have a clue!
choice_data_list: Then how about we ask her ourselves?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...Pardon?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
N-Now, just hold on there, Trainer. Where do you
think you're going?

text_block_list.name: Crowd
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
It's been a long time since I've seen someone
switch tours. Years, at least...

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
I really wanted to see Vodka take the usual tour
route and run the Japanese Oaks, like Scarlet.
She really could have taken the Queen's throne...

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Nah, that would've been too cliche. This is way
more interesting.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Not to me. It just feels like she ran away from the
Tiara.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
It seems like not everybody's happy with what
she's done.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The leading pack has passed the big tree and
they're onto the final stretch! Who'll push ahead
for the lead?!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And it's Vodka! Vodka's broken through the
pack... but she looks like she's struggling! She
can't quite overtake the front!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
See, what did I tell you? She should have gone for
the Japanese Oaks, not the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Skeptical murmurs rise from the crowd, but Vodka
keeps on running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her head held high and her eyes focused
forward, she brushes off their concerns, never
straying from her path.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: What the heck?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: What are you doing?! Are you really going to lose now?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Show them why you're here! Pull yourself together
and run like I know you can!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Show them you weren't just running away from
me!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Hold on... Vodka's making a break for it! She's
done it! She's used her sprinting skills to break
through!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The winner of the Japanese Derby is Vodka! She
powered past the others and made it to the finish
line!

text_block_list.name: Crowd
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: See! Wasn't she amazing?!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
You're right. My heart was racing! She was the
coolest!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: I'll never forget this race for the rest of my life!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: A race... the crowds will never forget...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Nothing.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Vodka ran the Derby. That's all. Nothing more,
nothing less.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: But... why can't I get it out of my head?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Why can't I forget the moment she became
number one?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Cool? What does that even mean?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
It's just some nonsense she keeps spouting. It
doesn't mean anything tangible... So, why...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I can't stand this! I need to beat her!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
She took away my "number one" title. I need to
take it back!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A brilliant flame burns in Daiwa Scarlet's eyes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's still not really able to see where this quest
for "number one" will take her, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think we've found a big clue. Next up is the
Shuka Sho, the last race of the Triple Tiara.
